message:
🌱 Add keycloak: Make domains for organisations optional mission (#874)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keycloak-31285-make-domains-for-organisations-optional",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keycloak: Make domains for organisations optional",
+    "description": "Make domains for organisations optional. Requested by 25+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Keycloak setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Keycloak version supports optional organization domains:\n```bash\n# If running in a container:\ndocker exec keycloak /opt/keycloak/bin/kc.sh show-config\n\n# Check the container image version:\ndocker inspect keycloak | grep -i image\n```\nThis feature requires a Keycloak version with the fix from PR #40508 (check the Keycloak release notes for availability)."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Understand the problem",
+        "description": "In earlier Keycloak versions with the Organizations feature, creating an organization required specifying at least one email domain. This was used for domain-based IDP routing (automatically directing users to the correct IDP based on their email domain).\n\nHowever, many use cases do not need domain-based routing. For example, organizations representing customers, tenants, or departments may not have associated email domains. Making domains mandatory forced administrators to create dummy domains."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Create organizations without domains",
+        "description": "After upgrading to a Keycloak version with this fix, organizations can be created without specifying any domains:\n\n**Via the Admin Console:**\n1. Go to **Organizations**\n2. Click **Create organization**\n3. Fill in the organization name and other details\n4. Leave the **Domains** field empty (it is now optional)\n5. Click **Save**\n\n**Via the Admin REST API:**\n```bash\ncurl -X POST -H \"Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN\" \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"name\": \"My Organization\", \"domains\": []}' \\\n  https://your-keycloak/admin/realms/your-realm/organizations\n```\n\nSee the [source PR](https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/40508) for implementation details."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify organizations work without domains",
+        "description": "Test that organizations function correctly without associated domains:\n1. Create an organization without any domains (as shown above)\n2. Add members to the organization manually or via the Admin REST API\n3. Verify that organization membership and role assignments work correctly\n4. If using IDP linking, note that domain-based auto-routing will not be available for domainless organizations (members must be added manually)"
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Keycloak made email domains optional when creating organizations. Previously, at least one domain was required, which forced administrators to create dummy domains for organizations that do not have associated email domains (e.g., customer accounts, departments). Organizations without domains still function for membership and role management, but domain-based IDP routing is not available for them.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "keycloak",
+      "community",
+      "identity",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "keycloak"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/issues/31285",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/40508"
+    },
+    "reactions": 25,
+    "comments": 5,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Keycloak server (via Docker/Podman or Kubernetes with the Keycloak Operator) with the Organizations feature enabled."
+  },
+  "security": {
